data.title: V2Y Corporation Announces Change in Company Secretary
data.description:
V2Y Corporation Ltd. (SG:V2Y) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

V2Y Corporation Ltd. has announced a change in its company secretary positions, with Mr. Cai Jingren stepping down and Mr. Chia Wildy being appointed, effective January 3, 2025. This strategic move reflects the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its governance structure. The board expressed gratitude to Mr. Cai for his contributions during his tenure.

data.title: China Industrial Securities Invests in GM Financial Notes
data.description:
China Industrial Securities International Financial Group Ltd. (HK:6058) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

China Industrial Securities International Financial Group Ltd. has engaged in a significant transaction by subscribing to notes issued by General Motors Financial Company, Inc., with a total subscription amount of US$7 million. The notes, offering a fixed interest rate of 5.35% and maturing in 2030, were acquired through CISI Investment, a wholly-owned subsidiary of the company. This transaction highlights CISI’s strategic financial maneuvers in the global market.

data.title: Flutter Entertainment Continues Strategic Share Buyback
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Flutter Entertainment PLC ( (FLUT) ) has shared an update.

Flutter Entertainment PLC announced the acquisition and subsequent cancellation of a significant number of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback program. This transaction, facilitated by Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, is a portion of their broader goal to repurchase $5 billion in shares, potentially enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure.

More about Flutter Entertainment PLC

Flutter Entertainment PLC is a global sports betting, gaming, and entertainment provider. The company engages in offering a wide range of entertainment products and services, focusing on the sports betting and gaming industry across various markets.

Zenith Energy ( (GB:ZEN) ) has provided an update.

Zenith Energy Ltd announced a change in its major holdings, with Nordnet AB acquiring a larger percentage of voting rights. data.title: BlackRock Acquires 5% Voting Rights in Inchcape
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest update is out from Inchcape ( (GB:INCH) ).

Inchcape PLC, a UK-based company, has experienced a change in its voting rights structure following BlackRock, Inc.’s acquisition of a 5% voting rights threshold. This change was officially crossed on December 31, 2024, and notified to Inchcape on January 2, 2025. As a result of the acquisition, BlackRock now holds a total of 19,751,305 voting rights in Inchcape PLC, marking a significant increase in its influence within the company. Such a shift could impact Inchcape’s operations and governance, potentially influencing strategic decisions and shareholder dynamics.

More about Inchcape

YTD Price Performance: -1.10%

Average Trading Volume: 766,206

data.title: Paragon Banking Group Corrects Director Shareholding Details
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest update is out from Paragon Banking Group PLC ( (GB:PAG) ).

Paragon Banking Group PLC announced a correction to the Director/PDMR Shareholding report initially released on 20 December 2024. The amendment adjusts the value of a Salary in Shares (SIS) payment to R J Woodman, ensuring accuracy in the reported financial details. The company’s Executive Directors received shares under the SIS, a remuneration policy where 20% of salary is given in shares released over five years. Additionally, directors exercised options under the Paragon Sharesave Plan 2019. Such transactions highlight the company’s ongoing commitment to aligning executive compensation with shareholder interests and maintaining regulatory compliance.

More about Paragon Banking Group PLC

Mooreast Holdings Ltd. is encountering challenges as their lender failed to disburse a S$1,000,000 deposit under a Convertible Loan Agreement. data.title: Guangzhou Auto’s 2024 Production and Sales Decline
data.description:
Guangzhou Automobile Group Co (HK:2238) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Guangzhou Automobile Group Co., Ltd. reported a significant decline in both production and sales volumes for 2024, with production dropping by 24.21% and sales by 20.04% year-on-year. Despite a monthly increase in December sales by 9.3%, the overall annual figures reflect a challenging year for the company. Investors might find the contrasting performance of various subsidiaries, such as GAC Motor’s notable sales growth and GAC Honda’s steep declines, particularly intriguing.

For further insights into HK:2238 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

An update from Iomart Group plc ( (GB:IOM) ) is now available.

Iomart Group plc has announced its total voting rights and share capital figures as of December 31, 2024. The company has 112,737,900 Ordinary Shares, with 140,773 held in an Employee Benefit Trust and none held in treasury, resulting in 112,597,127 total voting rights. This information is crucial for shareholders to determine their interest in the company as per the Financial Conduct Authority’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.
